channel.title: Giampaolo Rodola - unicode
channel.description: Python enthusiast, core developer, psutil author

item.title: Fixing Unicode in psutil across Python 2 and 3
item.description:
This one took a while. Adding proper Unicode support to psutil was four months of auditing, design decisions, and rewriting nearly every API that returned a string. The full journey is documented in #1040, and what follows is a summary.

This can serve as a case study for any Python …
item.dc:creator: Giampaolo Rodola
